## Pattern Summary

| Aspect | Before (1-based) | After (0-based) |
|--------|------------------|-----------------|
| First session folder | `1/` | `0/` |
| N sessions → latest | folder `N` | folder `N-1` |
| Archived loop | `for i := 1; i < N` | `for i := 0; i < N-1` |
| New session index | `len(Sessions) + 1` | `len(Sessions)` |
